## Summary

- describe the task clearly
- keep implementation in the root app, not `quest-companion`

## Canonical Docs

- [ ] `docs/PRODUCT_PLAN.md` updated if scope, status, priority, or acceptance criteria changed
- [ ] `docs/PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md` updated if user-facing flow, positioning, or limitations materially changed
- [ ] `docs/TECHNICAL_PLAN.md` updated if schema, API, env, conventions, or deployment changed
- [ ] `docs/DESIGN_DIRECTION.md` updated if visual treatment, IA, tokens, or component rules changed
- [ ] `docs/AGENT_HANDOFF.md` updated if workflow, conventions, or common-mistakes guidance changed

## Verification

- [ ] relevant validation command(s) run (typically `npm run verify`)
- [ ] `npm run discipline:check` clean
- [ ] no new product implementation was added under `quest-companion/`
- [ ] no Open Strategic Decision in `docs/PRODUCT_PLAN.md` was silently picked
